text: My landlord has ignored three written requests to fix a broken furnace and it has been below freezing in my unit for a week.
There is black mold spreading across my bedroom ceiling and my kid keeps getting sick. The landlord won't respond.
My employer has not paid me for the last three weeks of work even though I worked full hours.
I was let go the day after I told HR I was pregnant. No warning, no cause given.
My manager keeps making sexual comments and touching my shoulder despite me asking him to stop.
The bank charged me a 45 dollar overdraft fee twice for the same transaction and refuses to reverse it.
My internet has been down for 12 days, Rogers keeps promising a technician who never shows up, and they still billed me full price.
A store clerk refused to serve me and told me to go back to my country because of my accent.
The nightclub would not let my friend in because he uses a wheelchair, saying it was a safety issue.
Construction crews start jackhammering at 6am every day outside my building, well before the permitted hours.
There is a massive pothole on my street that has already damaged two cars, and the city hasn't fixed it in months.
Garbage has not been collected on my street for three weeks and it is attracting rats.
A restaurant is dumping cooking grease straight into the storm drain behind their kitchen.
I applied for my citizenship over two years ago and IRCC has not given me any update or response.
A government office lost my file containing my SIN and address and I think my data was exposed.
A police officer stopped and searched me for no reason and was verbally abusive.
My family doctor prescribed the wrong medication and I ended up in the ER for three days.
I have been waiting 14 months for an MRI that my specialist said was urgent.
A company keeps sending me marketing texts after I unsubscribed five times and I never gave them my number.
My child's school has done nothing about ongoing bullying that I have reported repeatedly.
Ev sahibim iki aydır bozuk kaloriferi tamir etmiyor ve evde don olayı yaşanıyor.
İşverenim son üç haftanın maaşını hiç ödemedi, tam mesai çalıştım.
Mon propriétaire refuse de réparer une fuite d'eau importante depuis un mois.
La banque m'a facturé deux fois des frais de découvert pour la même transaction.
